{{Short description|None}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=March 2021}}
This is a '''list of professional wrestling television series'''.

==Territory-era (1950s–1970s)==
{{main|Professional wrestling in the United States#1948–1984: Territory era, rise of television}}
{|class="wikitable sortable"
|-
!Series
!Country
!Duration
!Promotion
!No. of episodes
!Ref.
|-
|''[[Hollywood Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1947–1955
|[[NWA Hollywood Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''Championship Wrestling from Florida'' (CWF)
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1949–1987
|[[Championship Wrestling from Florida]]
|
|
|-
|''[[Wrestling from Marigold]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[DuMont Television Network|DuMont]]: 1949–1955<br>[[WGN-TV]]: 1955–1957
|[[Fred Kohler Enterprises]]
|
|
|-
|''[[Fédération Française de Catch Professionnel|Le Catch]]''
|{{FRA}}
|[[Radiodiffusion-Télévision Française|RTF]]/[[Office de Radiodiffusion Télévision Française|ORTF]]<br>[[France 2|Antenne 2]]<br>[[France 3|FR3]]: 1951–1987
|[[Fédération Française de Catch Professionnel|FFCP]]
|
|
|-
|''Portland Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1953–1992
|[[Pacific Northwest Wrestling]]
|
|<ref>{{cite news|last=Terry|first=John|date=25 September 2010|title='Portland Wrestling' lit up early TV screens and NW fans|url=https://www.oregonlive.com/O/2010/09/portland_wrestling_lit_up_earl.html|work=[[The Oregonian]]}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.portland-wrestling.com/|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20070929092101/http://www.portland-wrestling.com/|url-status=usurped|archive-date=29 September 2007|title="Live! From The Portland Sport's Arena, This Is Portland Wrestling!"|author=<!--Not stated-->|website=Portland-Wrestling.com}}</ref> 
|-
|''Japan Pro Wrestling Alliance''
|{{JPN}}
|[[TV Asahi|NET]] (Japan): 1953–1973
|[[Japan Pro Wrestling Alliance]]
|
| 
|-
|''Saturday Night Wrasslin'''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1954–1977
|American International Wrestling
|
|<ref>{{cite news|last=Rudy|first=Vaughn|date=2 December 1984|title=Love Reminisces as Oak Hill Station Celebrates Anniversary|url=http://members.aol.com/jeff1070/woay2.html|work=[[The Register-Herald|The Raleigh Register]]|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20070301103120/http://members.aol.com/jeff1070/woay2.html|archive-date=1 March 2007}}</ref><ref>{{cite episode|title=Saturday Night Wrasslin'|series=Newswatch 4|network=[[WOAY-TV]]|date=1999|last=Snyder|first=Nancy (host)}}</ref><ref>{{cite news|last=Porterfield|first=Mannix|date=25 December 2004|title=Saturday Night Wrestlin' — A West Virginia Legend|url=http://members.aol.com/jeff1070/woay2.html|work=[[The Register-Herald|The Raleigh Register]]|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20070301103120/http://members.aol.com/jeff1070/woay2.html|archive-date=1 March 2007}}</ref><ref>{{cite encyclopedia|url=https://www.wvencyclopedia.org/articles/1719|title=Oak Hill Wrestling|encyclopedia=e-WV: The West Virginia Encyclopedia|date=29 May 2013|publisher=West Virginia Humanities Council}}</ref>
|-
|''Professional Wrestling''
|{{GBR}}
|[[ITV (TV network)|ITV]]: 1955–1976<!--Pre "World of Sport" 1955–1964 and non-"World of Sport" midweek standalone broadcasts until 1976-->
|[[Professional wrestling in the United Kingdom#Joint Promotions|Joint Promotions]]
|
|
|-
|''[[Heavyweight Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[DuMont Television Network|DuMont]]: 1956<br>Syndicated: 1956–1970
|[[Capitol Wrestling Corporation]]
|
|<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.thehistoryofwwe.com/dcreview.htm|title=Review: WWWF Heavyweight Wrestling From Washington DC (January 13, 1966)|last=Kane III|first=Sheldon|date=17 August 2004|website=TheHistoryOfWWE.com}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|last=Hornbaker|first=Tim|url=http://www.legacyofwrestling.com/WashingtonDCTV.html|title=Washington, D.C. Wrestling Television History|website=LegacyOfWrestling.com}}</ref>
|-
|''[[Stampede Wrestling#Television program|Stampede Wrestling]]''
|{{CAN}}
|Syndicated: 1957–1989; 1999–2000
|[[Stampede Wrestling]]
|
| 
|-
|''All Star Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1958–1979
|[[Big Time Wrestling (San Francisco)|Big Time Wrestling]]
|
|<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.kayfabememories.com/Regions/sanfrancisco/sanfrancisco6.htm|title=Regional Territories: San Francisco #6|last=Berry|first=Vik|website=KayfabeMemories.com}}</ref>
|-
|''[[Studio Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1959–1972
|
|
| 
|-
|''[[Wrestling at the Chase]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1959–1983
|[[St. Louis Wrestling Club]]
|
| 
|-
|''50th State Big Time Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1962–1979
|[[50th State Big Time Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''Vancouver All-Star Wrestling''
|{{CAN}}
|Syndicated: 1962–1989
|[[NWA All-Star Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''[[Titanes en el ring]]''
|{{ARG}}
|[[El Nueve|Canal 9]]: 1962–1988
|
|
|
|-
|''Big Time Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1964–1980
|[[Big Time Wrestling (Detroit)|Big Time Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''WWA All-Star Championship Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1964–1989
|[[World Wrestling Association (Indianapolis)|World Wrestling Association]]
|
|
|-
|''World Championship Wrestling''
|{{AUS}}
|[[Nine Network|Channel 9]]: 1964–1978
|[[World Championship Wrestling (Australia)|World Championship Wrestling]]
|
|<ref>{{cite web|url=https://nostalgiacentral.com/television/tv-by-decade/tv-shows-1960s/world-championship-wrestling/|title=World Championship Wrestling|author=<!--Not stated-->|website=NostalgiaCentral.com|date=22 June 2014}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://slam.canoe.com/Slam/Wrestling/2018/08/23/22785177.html|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20191109202128/http://slam.canoe.com/Slam/Wrestling/2018/08/23/22785177.html|url-status=dead|archive-date=9 November 2019|title=Australian documentary covers WCW's glory days|last=Davies|first=Don|date=23 August 2018|website=[[Canoe.com|Canadian Online Explorer]]|publisher=SLAM! Wrestling}}</ref>
|-
|''[[World of Sport (British TV programme)|World of Sport]]'' (wrestling slot)
|{{GBR}}
|[[ITV (TV network)|ITV]]: 1965–1985<!--WOSW gets a separate entry below-->
|[[Professional wrestling in the United Kingdom#Joint Promotions|Joint Promotions]]
|
|
|-
|''[[Telecatch]]''
|{{BRA}}
|[[TV Excelsior]]: 1967–1980
|
|
|
|-
|''Big Time Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1971–1979
|[[World Class Championship Wrestling|NWA Big Time Wrestling]]
|
|<ref name="TSHA">{{cite encyclopedia|last=Jasinski|first=Laurie E.|url=https://tshaonline.org/handbook/online/articles/xds11|title=SPORTATORIUM|encyclopedia=Handbook of Texas|date=27 May 2015|publisher=[[Texas State Historical Association]]}}</ref><ref>{{cite news|last=McDonald|first=Chris|date=29 March 2016|title=Blood, Sweat and Fire: Dallas' Heroes Helped Make Wrestlemania a Sports Powerhouse|url=https://www.dallasobserver.com/arts/blood-sweat-and-fire-dallas-heroes-helped-make-wrestlemania-a-sports-powerhouse-8159025|work=[[Dallas Observer]]}}</ref>
|-
|''NWA Georgia Championship Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|[[TBS (American TV channel)|TBS]]: 1971–1984
|[[Georgia Championship Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''[[WWF Championship Wrestling|WWWF Championship Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1972–1979
|[[Capitol Wrestling Corporation#World Wide Wrestling Federation (1963–1979)|World Wide Wrestling Federation]]
|
|
|-
|''All Japan Pro Wrestling''
|{{JPN}}
|[[Nippon Television|Nippon TV]]: 1972–2000
|[[All Japan Pro Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''NJPW World Pro-Wrestling''
|{{JPN}}
|[[TV Asahi|NET]]: 1973–1977<br>[[TV Asahi]]: 1977–present
|[[New Japan Pro-Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''Lucha Libre Internacional''
|{{DOM}}
|[[Color Visión|Canal 9]]: 1973–1997
|
|
|
|-
|''[[List of WWE television programming#All-Star Wrestling (1971–1986)|WW(W)F All-Star Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1974–1986
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|
|
|-
|''[[Best of World Championship Wrestling|Best of Championship Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[TBS (American TV channel)|TBS]]: 1973–1987
|[[Georgia Championship Wrestling]]<br/>[[Jim Crockett Promotions]]
|
|
|-
|''[[On the Mat]]''
|{{NZL}}
|[[TVNZ 2|TV2]]: 1975–1984
|NWA New Zealand
|
|
|-
|''[[Superstars of Wrestling (Canadian TV series)|Superstars of Wrestling]]''
|{{CAN}}
|Syndicated: 1975–1984
|[[George Cannon (wrestler)|Canadian-American Wrestling Association]]
|
|
|-
|''[[WCW WorldWide|Wide World Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1975–1978
|[[Jim Crockett Promotions]]<br>[[National Wrestling Alliance]]
|
|
|-
|''CWA Championship Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|[[WMC-TV]]: 1977–1989
|[[Continental Wrestling Association]]
|
|
|-
|''International Championship Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1977–1979
|[[International Championship Wrestling (Mississippi)|International Championship Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''[[WCW WorldWide|NWA World Wide Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1978–1992
|[[Jim Crockett Promotions]]<br>[[National Wrestling Alliance]]<br>[[World Championship Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''Mid-South Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1979–1986<br>[[TBS (American TV channel)|TBS]]: 1985
|[[Universal Wrestling Federation (Bill Watts)|Mid-South Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|}

==1980s wrestling boom==
{{main|1980s professional wrestling boom}}
{|class="wikitable sortable"
|-
!Series
!Country
!Duration
!Promotion
!No. of episodes
!Ref.
|-
|''World Class Championship Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1982–1989<br>[[ESPN]]: 1986–1989
|[[World Class Championship Wrestling]]
|
|<ref name="TSHA"/><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.legacyofwrestling.com/FritzVonErich.html|title=Fritz Von Erich Wrestling History|last=Hornbaker|first=Tim|website=LegacyOfWrestling.com}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.prowrestlinghistoricalsociety.com/articles-0071.html|title="Okay...Okay...Now This HAS To Be Real!""Okay...Okay...Now This HAS To Be Real!"|last=Grover|first=Harry|date=15 October 2014|website=ProWrestlingHistoricalSociety.com}}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine|last=Cornette|first=Jim|author-link=Jim Cornette|date=April 2017|title=The SMW – Shows of Summer|url=https://www.jimcornette.com/fighting-spirit/smw-shows-summer-fsm144|magazine=[[Fighting Spirit Magazine]]|location=United Kingdom}}</ref>
|-
|''[[WWF All American Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[USA Network]]: 1983–1994
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[Black Saturday (professional wrestling)|WWF on TBS]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[TBS (American TV channel)|TBS]]: 1984–1985
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[List of WWE television programming#Wrestling Spotlight (1986–1995)|WWF Wrestling Spotlight]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1984–1995
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|
| 
|-
|''International Championship Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1984–1995
|[[International World Class Championship Wrestling]]
|
| 
|-
|''Reslo''
|{{UK}}
|[[S4C]]: 1982–1995
|[[Orig Williams|BWF]]
|
| 
|-
|''Professional Wrestling''
|{{UK}}
|[[ITV (TV network)|ITV]]: 1985–1988
|[[Professional wrestling in the United Kingdom#Joint Promotions|Joint Promotions]], [[All Star Wrestling]], [[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|
| 
|-
|''Satellite Wrestling Challenge''
|{{UK}}
|[[Screensport (TV channel)|Screensport]]: 1985–1986
|[[All Star Wrestling]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[Tuesday Night Titans|WWF Tuesday Night Titans]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[USA Network]]: 1984–1986
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|103
|
|-
|''[[Saturday Night's Main Event]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[NBC]]: 1985–1991; 2006–2008; 2024–2025<br>[[Fox Broadcasting Company|FOX]]: 1992
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|36
|
|-
|''[[WWF Prime Time Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[USA Network]]: 1985–1993
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|417
|
|-
|''[[WWF Wrestling Challenge]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1986–1995
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[AWA Championship Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[ESPN]]: 1985–1990
|[[American Wrestling Association]]
|
|
|-
|''[[WWF Superstars of Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1986–1996<br>[[USA Network]]: 1996–2000<br>[[Paramount Network|TNN]]: 2000–2001
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|
| 
|-
|''Universal Wrestling Federation''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1986–1987
|[[Universal Wrestling Federation (Bill Watts)]]
|
| 
|-
|''GLOW: Gorgeous Ladies of Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1986–1990, 2001
|[[Gorgeous Ladies of Wrestling]]
|
| 
|-
|''WWC Superestrellas de la Lucha Libre''
|{{PRI}}
|[[WAPA-TV]]: 1980's–present
|[[World Wrestling Council]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[Superstars of Wrestling (American TV series)|Superstars of Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1986–1992
|
|
| 
|-
|''[[WCW Pro]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1986–1998, [[TBS (American TV channel)|TBS]]: 1994–1998
|[[World Championship Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''Southern Championship Wrestling from Georgia''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1988–1990
|[[Southern Championship Wrestling (Georgia)|Southern Championship Wrestling]]
|
| 
|-
|''EWF Wrestling'' aka ''New Catch''
|{{FRA}}
|[[Eurosport]]: 1988–1992
|European Wrestling Federation
|
| 
|-
|''[[WWF The Main Event]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[NBC]]: 1988–1991
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|5 specials
|
|-
|''[[Clash of the Champions|WCW Clash of the Champions]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[TBS (American TV channel)|TBS]]: 1988–1997
|[[World Championship Wrestling]]
|35 specials
|
|-
|''[[WCW Main Event]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[TBS (American TV channel)|TBS]]: 1988–1998
|[[World Championship Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''[[WCW Power Hour]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[TBS (American TV channel)|TBS]]: 1989–1994
|[[World Championship Wrestling]]
|301
|
|-
|''Legends of World Class Championship Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|[[ESPN]]: 1988–1989
|[[World Class Championship Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''Legends of United States Wrestling Association''
|{{USA}}
|[[ESPN]]: 1990–1991
|[[United States Wrestling Association]]
|
|
|-
|''USWA Championship Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1989–1996<br>[[ESPN]] 1989–1991
|[[United States Wrestling Association]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[UWF Fury Hour]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[SportsChannel#SportsChannel America|SportsChannel America]]: 1990–1991<br>[[FanDuel Sports Network West|Prime Ticket]]: 1992<br>[[ESPN2]]: 1995
|[[Universal Wrestling Federation (Herb Abrams)]]
|69
|
|-
|''[[On the Mat#Revival with The Main Event|The Main Event]]''
|{{NZL}}
|TV3: 1990
|NWA New Zealand
|
|
|}

==1990s wrestling boom==
{{main|Monday Night War}}
{|class="wikitable sortable"
|-
!Series
!Country
!Duration
!Promotion
!No. of episodes
!Ref.
|-
|''Wrestling''
|{{UK}}
|[[Grampian Television|Grampian]]/[[Scottish Television|STV]] 1990, 1993
|[[Professional wrestling in the United Kingdom#Joint Promotions|Joint Promotions]] ([[George_de_Relwyskow|Relwyskow]])
|4 specials
|
|-
|''World Alliance Wrestling''
|{{UK}}
|[[ITV Central|Central]]: 1990
|World Alliance Wrestling
|
|
|-
|''GWF Major League Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|[[ESPN]]: 1991–1994
|[[Global Wrestling Federation]]
|
|<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.thewrestlingrevolution.com/user-article.php?id=11|title=That 80's Column #3 – The GWF|author=<!--Not stated-->|date=5 December 2017|website=TheWrestlingRevolution.com}}</ref>
|-
|''[[WCW Saturday Night]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[TBS (American TV channel)|TBS]]: 1991–2000
|[[World Championship Wrestling]]
|
| 
|-
|''Smoky Mountain Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1992–1995
|[[Smoky Mountain Wrestling]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[WCW WorldWide]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1992–2001
|[[National Wrestling Alliance]]<br>[[World Championship Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''CMLL On Televisa''
|{{MEX}}
|[[Televisa Deportes]]: 1991–present
|[[Consejo Mundial de Lucha Libre]]
|
| 
|-
|''CMLL Guadalajara TV''
|{{MEX}}
|Syndicated: 1992–2013
|[[Consejo Mundial de Lucha Libre]]
|
| 
|-
|''AAA Sin Limite''
|{{MEX}}
|[[Televisa Deportes]]: 1992–2019
|[[Lucha Libre AAA Worldwide|Asistencia Asesoría y Administración]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[ECW Hardcore TV]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1993–2000
|[[Extreme Championship Wrestling]]
|401
|
|-
|''BCW Wrestling''
|{{CAN}}
|Syndicated:1993-2012
|[[Border City Wrestling]]
|
|-
|''[[WWE Raw]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Paramount Network|TNN/Spike TV]]: 2000–2005<br>[[Syfy]]: 2008; 2009; 2022–2024 (overflow)<br>[[USA Network]]: 1993–2000, 2005–2024<br>[[Netflix]]: 2025–present
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]<br>([[Raw (WWE brand)|Raw]] from 2002)
|1712 ({{as of|2026|03|16|lc=on}})
|
|-
|''[[WWF Mania]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[USA Network]]: 1993–1996
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[List of WWE television programming#Action Zone (1994–1996)|WWF Action Zone]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1994–1996
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[List of WWE television programming#Sunday Night Slam (1994–1995)|WWF Sunday Night Slam]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[USA Network]]: 1994–1995, [[Prevue Channel]]: 1995
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|3 specials
|
|-
|''[[WCW Monday Nitro]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[TNT (American TV network)|TNT]]: 1995–2001
|[[World Championship Wrestling]]
|288
|
|-
|''[[American Wrestling Federation#Warriors of Wrestling|AWF Warriors of Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1995–1996
|[[American Wrestling Federation]]
|
|
|-
|''NWC Slammin' TV''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1995
|[[National Wrestling Conference]]
|15 
| 
|-
|''[[WCW Prime]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Prime Sports|Prime Sports Network]]: 1995–1997
|[[World Championship Wrestling]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[List of WWE television programming#Free for All (1996–2009)|WWF Free for All]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Pay-per-view|Pay-Per-View]]: 1996–2009
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|
|
|-
|''Big Japan Pro Wrestling''
|{{JPN}}
|Samurai TV: 1996–present
|[[Big Japan Pro Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''[[List of WWE television programming#LiveWire (1996–2001)|WWF LiveWire]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[USA Network]]: 1996–2000<br>[[Paramount Network|TNN]]: 2000–2001
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|
| 
|-
|''Promo Azteca TV''
|{{MEX}}
|[[TV Azteca]]: 1996–1998
|[[Promo Azteca]]
|
|
|-
|''[[List of WWE television programming#Friday Night's Main Event (1997)|WWF Friday Night's Main Event]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[USA Network]]: 1997
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|2 specials
|
|-
|''[[WWF Shotgun Saturday Night]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1997–1999
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|62
|
|-
|''OVW TV''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1997–2013<br>[[Ion Television]]: 2013–2015<br>[[WBNA]]: 2015–2024<br>[[YouTube]]: 2017–2024
|[[Ohio Valley Wrestling]]
|1275
|
|-
|''[[WWE Heat]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[USA Network]]: 1998–2000<br>[[MTV]]: 2000–2003<br>[[Paramount Network|TNN/Spike TV]]: 2003–2005<br>WWE.com: 2005–2008
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]<br>([[Raw (WWE brand)|Raw]] from 2002)
|513
|
|-
|''[[List of WWE television programming#Super Astros (1998–1999)|WWF Super Astros]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Univision]]: 1998–1999
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|42
|
|-
|''[[WCW Thunder]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[TBS (American TV channel)|TBS]]: 1998–2001
|[[World Championship Wrestling]]
|156
|
|-
|''[[ECW on TNN]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Paramount Network|TNN]]: 1999–2000
|[[Extreme Championship Wrestling]]
|59
|
|-
|''[[WWF Jakked and WWF Metal|WWF Jakked/Metal]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 1999–2002
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Federation]]
|193
|
|-
|''UWA Wrestling Rampage'' 
|{{GBR}}
|[[L!VE TV]]: 1999
|Ultimate Wrestling Alliance
|21
|<ref>{{cite web|url=http://backbodydrop.com/blog/reviews/uwa-wrestling-rampage-episode-1/|title=UWA: Wrestling Rampage – Episode 1|author=<!--Not stated-->|date=21 October 2016|website=BackBodyDrop.com}}</ref>
|-
|''Transatlantic Wrestling Challenge''
|{{GBR}}
|[[ITV Anglia|Anglia]], [[ITV Wales & West|HTV]], [[ITV Meridian|Meridian]], [[ITV2]]: 2000
|NWA UK Hammerlock, [[NWA Wildside]]
|6
|
|}

==Modern-era (2002–present)==
{|class="wikitable sortable"
|-
!Series
!Country
!Duration
!Promotion
!No. of episodes
!Ref.
|-
|''[[WWE SmackDown]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[UPN]]: 1999–2006<br>[[The CW]]: 2006–2008<br>[[MyNetworkTV]]: 2008–2010<br> [[Syfy]]: 2010–2016<br>[[Fox Broadcasting Company|FOX]]: 2019–2024<br>[[Fox Sports 1|FS1]] (overflow coverage): 2019–2024<br>[[USA Network]]: 2016–2019; 2024–present
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]<br>([[SmackDown (WWE brand)|SmackDown]] from 2002)
|1387 ({{as of|2026|3|20|lc=on}})
|
|-
|-
|''WLW-TV''
|{{USA}}
|[[America One]]: 1999<br>[[Ion Television#PAX (1998–2005)|PAX TV]]: 1999-???<br>Syndicated: 2018–2019<br>[[YouTube]]: 2018–2019
|[[Harley Race's Wrestling Academy|World League Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''Ultimate Pro Wrestling'' 
|{{USA}}
|[[KDOC-TV]]: 1999–2002
|[[Ultimate Pro Wrestling]]
|
| 
|-
|''IWA Zona Caliente''
|{{PRI}}
|[[Telemundo Internacional|Canal 2]]: 2000–2008
|[[International Wrestling Association (Puerto Rico)|IWA Puerto Rico]]
|
|
|-
|''WXO Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 2000
|The WXO
|3
|<ref>{{cite web|url=https://variety.com/2000/tv/news/wxo-enters-wrestling-ring-1117760667/|title='WXO' enters wrestling ring|last=Pursell|first=Chris|date=9 January 2000|website=Variety.com|publisher=[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]]}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.cagesideseats.com/2009/9/1/1011515/startup-promotion-of-the-day-the|title=Startup promotion of the day: The WXO|last=Bixenspan|first=David|date=1 September 2009|website=CagesideSeats.com}}</ref>
|-
|''[[Women of Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 2000–2001; 2022–present<br>[[KVCW]]: 2012–2018<br>[[AXS TV]]: 2019–2020<br>[[Pluto TV]]: 2022–present
|[[Women of Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''Urban Wrestling Alliance''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 2000–2001
|Urban Wrestling Alliance
|8
|<ref>{{cite news|last=Varsallone|first=Jim|date=20 August 2001|title=BET Cable Channel To Air UWA|work=[[St. Petersburg Times]]}}</ref> 
|-
|''PCW Full Throttle''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 2000–2009
|Professional Championship Wrestling
|
|
|-
|''NOAH Power Hour''
|{{JPN}}
|[[Nippon Television|Nippon TV]]: 2000–2009<br>[[NTV G+]]: 2009–2020
|[[Pro Wrestling Noah]]
|
|
|-
|''IWA Impacto Total''
|{{PRI}}
|[[Telemundo Internacional|Telemundo]]: 2000–2010
|[[International Wrestling Association (Puerto Rico)|IWA Puerto Rico]]
|
|
|-
|''XPW TV''
|{{USA}}
|[[KDOC-TV]]: 2000–2002<br>[[Triller TV|FITE TV]]: 2021–2022<br>Stream XPW: 2022–2024
|[[Xtreme Pro Wrestling]]
|118
|
|-
|''CZW Fake You TV''
|{{USA}}
|[[WGTW-TV]]: 2001–2006
|[[Combat Zone Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''Pro Wrestling Zero1''
|{{JPN}}
|Samurai TV: 2001–present
|[[Pro Wrestling Zero1]]
|
|
|-
|''[[WWE Tough Enough]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[MTV]]: 2001–2003<br>[[UPN]]: 2004<br>[[USA Network]]: 2011; 2015
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|68
|
|-
|''[[List of WWE television programming#Excess (2001–2002)|WWE Excess]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Paramount Network|TNN]]: 2001–2002
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|37
|
|-
|''High Impact TV''
|{{USA}}
|[[WGTW-TV]]: 2002-2003
|[[Ring of Honor]]
|20
|
|-
|''XPW Monday Nightmare''
|{{USA}}
|[[WGTW-TV]]: 2002–2003
|[[Xtreme Pro Wrestling]]
|28
|
|-
|''MCW Rage TV''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 2002
|[[MCW Pro Wrestling|Maryland Championship Wrestling]]
|10?
|
|-
|''[[WWE Bottom Line]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 2002–2025
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|1104
|
|-
|''[[Total Nonstop Action Wrestling#Weekly pay-per-views (2002–2004)|NWA Total Nonstop Action]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Pay-per-view|Pay-Per-View]]: 2002–2004
|[[National Wrestling Alliance]]<br>[[Total Nonstop Action Wrestling]]
|111
|
|-
|''[[TNA Xplosion]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndication: 2002–2008<br>[[Webcast]]: 2008–2010<br>[[Global Wrestling Network]]: 2017–2019<br>[[Twitch (service)|Twitch]]: 2019–2021<br>[[TNA+]]: 2024–present<br>[[YouTube]]: 2024–present
|[[Total Nonstop Action Wrestling]]
|933
|
|-
|''[[WWE Confidential]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Paramount Network|Spike TV]]: 2002–2004
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|83
|
|-
|''[[Johnny Vaughan]]'s World of Sport''
|{{UK}}
|[[BBC Three]]: 2003 <br>(revival of above World Of Sport show, included wrestling slot as per original)
|[[ Professional wrestling in the United Kingdom#1990s–2000s: "Old school" and "New school"|Premier Promotions]]
|
|
|-
|''[[WWE Afterburn]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 2002–2024
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|1104
|
|-
|''[[WWE Velocity]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Paramount Network|Spike TV]]: 2002–2005<br>[[Webcast]]: 2005–2006
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]<br>([[SmackDown (WWE brand)|SmackDown]])
|204
|
|-
|''[[WWE Tribute to the Troops]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[UPN]]: 2003–2004<br>[[USA Network]]<br>2005–2018<br>[[NBC]]: 2008–2014<br>[[Fox Broadcasting Company|Fox]]: 2020–2023
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]<br>([[Raw (WWE brand)|Raw]] and [[SmackDown (WWE brand)|SmackDown]])
|20 ({{as of|2023|07|13|lc=on}})
|
|-
|''Memphis Wrestling'' 
|{{USA}}
|[[WLMT]]: 2003–2006; 2008–2014
|[[Memphis Wrestling]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[MLW Underground TV]]''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 2003–2004
|[[Major League Wrestling]]
|
|<ref>{{cite web|url=http://slam.canoe.com/Slam/Wrestling/2003/04/23/71604.html|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160311230800/http://slam.canoe.com/Slam/Wrestling/2003/04/23/71604.html|url-status=dead|archive-date=11 March 2016|title=MLW Underground announces new deal|author=<!--Not stated-->|date=23 April 2003|website=[[Canoe.com|Canadian Online Explorer]]|publisher=SLAM! Wrestling}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://lastwordonsports.com/2013/08/14/mlw-major-league-wrestling-a-look-back/|title=MLW: Major League Wrestling a look back|last=George|first=Justin|date=14 August 2013|website=Last Word On Sports}}</ref>
|-
|''[[WWE Diva Search]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Paramount Network|Spike]]: 2004–2005<br>[[USA Network]]: 2006<br>[[UPN]]: 2006<br>WWE.com: 2007
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|6
|
|-
|''FWA TV''
|{{GBR}}
|Portsmouth TV: 2001<br>[[The Wrestling Channel]]: 2004–2005
|[[Frontier Wrestling Alliance]]
|
|
|-
|''[[Champions Pro Wrestling#WWP Thunderstrike|WWP Thunderstrike]]''
|{{ZAF}}
|[[SABC 2]]: 2004–2009
|[[Champions Pro Wrestling|World Wrestling Professionals]]
|100
|<ref>{{cite web|url=https://bleacherreport.com/articles/376732-the-fighting-springbok-spotlight-on-world-wrestling-professionals-wwp|title=The Fighting Springbok: Spotlight On World Wrestling Professionals (WWP)|last=Lobb|first=Dean|date=11 April 2010|website=[[Bleacher Report]]}}</ref>
|-
|''AWF on E Slam Series''
|{{ZAF}}
|[[e.tv]]: 2004
|[[Africa Wrestling Alliance]]
|
| 
|-
|''IWRG on TVC Deportes''
|{{MEX}}
|[[TVC Deportes]]: 2004–2013
|[[International Wrestling Revolution Group]]
|
| 
|-
|''Dragon Gate''
|{{JPN}}
|Gaora TV: 2004–present
|[[Dragongate|Dragon Gate]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[WWE Experience]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Paramount Network|Spike TV]] and syndication: 2004–2020
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|
|
|-
|''[[TNA Impact!]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Fox Sports Networks|Fox Sports Net]]: 2004–2005<br>[[Webcast|TNAwrestling.com]]: 2005<br>[[Urban America Television]]: 2005<br>[[Paramount Network|Spike]]: 2005–2014<br>[[Destination America]]: 2015<br>[[Pop (American TV channel)|Pop]]: 2016–2019<br>[[Pursuit Channel]]: 2019<br>[[Twitch (service)|Twitch]]: 2019–2021<br>[[AXS TV]]: 2019–2026<br>[[TNA+]]: 2024–present<br>[[NESN|New England Sports Network]]: 2025–present<br>[[AMC (TV channel)|AMC]]: 2026–present
|[[Total Nonstop Action Wrestling]]
|1118 ({{as of|2026|01|15|lc=on}})
|
|-
|''NWE Destiny''
|{{ITA}}
|LA7 Sport: 2005–2006
|Nu-Wrestling Evolution
|
| 
|-
|''Memphis Wrestling Primetime'' 
|{{USA}}
|[[WLMT]]: 2006–2008
|[[Memphis Wrestling]]
|
| 
|-
|''AWE/WFX Overload''
|{{CAN}}
|[[Fight Network]]: 2006<br>[[America One]]: 2010
|Action Wrestling Entertainment<br/>Wrestling Fan Xperience
|
| 
|-
|''CMLL Guerreros del Ring''
|{{MEX}}
|[[MVS TV]]: 2006–present
|[[Consejo Mundial de Lucha Libre]]
|
| 
|-
|''IWF Wrestling''
|{{RUS}}
|[[Seven TV|Semyorka]]: 2006–2010
|Independent Wrestling Federation
|
|
|-
|''IWW Whiplash TV''
|{{IRL}}
|[[The Wrestling Channel]]: 2006–2008
|[[Irish Whip Wrestling]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[WWE ECW]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Syfy]]: 2006–2010
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]] ([[ECW (WWE brand)|ECW]])
|193
|
|-
|''Real Quality Wrestling'' 
|{{GBR}}
|[[The Wrestling Channel]]: 2006–2009
|Real Quality Wrestling
|
| 
|-
|''100% Lucha''
|{{ARG}}
|[[Telefe]]: 2006–2008
|
|
| 
|-
|''[[Wrestling Society X]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[MTV]]: 2007
|Big Vision Entertainment
|10
|
|-
|''[[Impact Pro Wrestling#National expansion and IPW Ignition (2004–2007)|IPW Ignition]]''
|{{NZL}}
|[[ALT TV]]: 2007–2011
|[[Impact Pro Wrestling]]
|
| 
|-
|''LDN Wrestling Capital TV''
|{{GBR}}
|[[The Wrestling Channel]]: 2007–2008
|LDN Wrestling
|
| 
|-
|''[[Wrestling Reality]]''
|{{CAN}}
|[[Fight Network]]: 2007
|
|
| 
|-
|''Dramatic Dream Team''
|{{JPN}}
|Samurai TV: 2007–present
|[[Dramatic Dream Team|DDT Pro-Wrestling]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[SlamTV!]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Webcast]]: 2007–2008
|[[Juggalo Championship Wrestling]]
|21
|
|-
|''[[TNA Today]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Webcast]]: 2007–2012
|[[Total Nonstop Action Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''CMLL On CadenaTres''
|{{MEX}}
|[[Cadenatres]]: 2007–2015
|[[Consejo Mundial de Lucha Libre]]
|
| 
|-
|''Tercera Caida''
|{{MEX}}
|[[TVC Deportes]]: 2007–2012
|[[TVC Deportes]]
|
| 
|-
|''Todos x el Todos''
|{{MEX}}
|[[TVC Deportes]]: 2007–2012
|[[TVC Deportes]]
|
| 
|-
|''PDM on TVC Deportes''
|{{MEX}}
|[[TVC Deportes]]: 2009–2012
|[[Los Perros del Mal]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[List of WWE television programming#Vintage (2008–2023)|WWE Vintage]] ''
|{{USA}}
|Various: 2008–present 
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|467 ({{as of|2017|5|11|lc=on}})
|
|-
|''[[Hulk Hogan's Celebrity Championship Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[CMT (American TV channel)|CMT]]: 2008
|
|8
|
|-
|''IWA Pro Wrestling''
|{{AUS}}
|[[Aurora Community Channel|Aurora]]: 2008–2009
|International Wrestling Australia
|
| 
|-
|''[[100% De Dana Dan]]''
|{{IND}}
|[[Viacom18|Colors]]: 2009
|[[Champions Pro Wrestling|World Wrestling Professionals]]
|26
|
|-
|''EPW Monday Night Wrestling''
|{{AUS}}
|[[Access 31]]: 2008–2010
|Explosive Pro Wrestling
|
| 
|-
|''[[New Zealand Wide Pro Wrestling#Invasion|NZWPW Invasion]]''
|{{NZL}}
|[[Face TV (New Zealand)|Triangle TV]]: 2008–2009
|[[New Zealand Wide Pro Wrestling]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[Off the Ropes]]''
|{{NZL}}
|[[Sky Open (TV channel)|Prime TV]]: 2009–2010
|Kiwi Pro Wrestling
|12
|
|-
|''[[Ring of Honor Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[AXS TV|HDNet]]: 2009–2011<br>[[Sinclair Broadcast Group|Sinclair stations]]: 2011–2022<br>[[Destination America]]: 2015<br>[[NESN]]: 2015–2022<br>[[Cox Sports Television]]: 2018–2019<br>[[Fox Sports Networks]]: 2019–2021<br>[[Honor Club]]: 2023–present
|[[Ring of Honor]]
|653 ({{as of|2023|07|13|lc=on}})
|
|-
|''AAA Lucha Libre Premier''
|{{MEX}}
|[[Fox Sports (Mexico)|Fox Sports]]: 2009–2010
|[[Lucha Libre AAA Worldwide|Asistencia Asesoría y Administración]]
|
| 
|-
|''Kardinal Sinners''
|{{CAN}}
|[[BBC Earth (Canadian TV channel)|Rush HD]]: 2009–2010
|
|
|<ref>{{cite web|url=http://slam.canoe.com/Slam/Wrestling/2009/04/21/9191151.html|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160228072917/http://slam.canoe.com/Slam/Wrestling/2009/04/21/9191151.html|url-status=dead|archive-date=28 February 2016|title=Kardinal Sinners docu-drama a peek into roller-coaster ride of indy wrestling|last=Kamchen|first=Richard|date=21 April 2009|website=[[Canoe.com|Canadian Online Explorer]]|publisher=SLAM! Wrestling}}</ref>
|-
|''PDM on TVC Deportes''
|{{MEX}}
|[[TVC Deportes]]: 2009–2012
|[[Los Perros del Mal]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[WWE Superstars]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[WGN America]]: 2009–2011<br>WWE.com: 2011–2012<br>[[Hulu|Hulu Plus]]: 2012–2016<br>[[WWE Network]]: 2014–2016
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|398 
|
|-
|''This is AWF Wrestling''
|{{AUS}}
|[[Foxtel]]: 2010–2011
|Australasian Wrestling Federation
|
| 
|-
|''CMLL Puebla''
|{{MEX}}
|[[TVC Deportes]]: 2008–present
|[[Consejo Mundial de Lucha Libre]]
|
| 
|-
|''Lucha Azteca (CMLL)''
|{{MEX}}
|[[TV Azteca|Azteca 7]]: 2009–2018
|[[Consejo Mundial de Lucha Libre]]
|
|
|-
|''DWE Zona de Impacto''
|{{DOM}}
|[[Color Visión|Canal 9]]: 2010–present
|Dominican Wrestling Entertainment
|
| 
|-
|''DTU TV''
|{{MEX}}
|[[TVC Deportes]]: 2010–2014
|Desastre Total Ultraviolento
|
|
|-
|''[[Lucha Libre USA|Lucha Libre USA: Masked Warriors]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[MTV2]]: 2010–2012
|[[Lucha Libre USA]]
|20
|
|-
|''[[WWE NXT]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Syfy]]: 2010<br>[[Webcast|WWE.com]]: 2010–2012<br>[[WWE Network]]: 2014–2019<br>[[USA Network]]: 2019–2024<br>[[The CW]]: 2024–present
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]<br>([[NXT (WWE brand)|NXT]])
|829 ({{as of|2026|3|17|lc=on}})
|
|-
|''[[Championship Wrestling from Hollywood|UWN Championship Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[KDOC-TV]]: 2010–present<br>[[Racer Network|MAVTV]]: 2013–present<br>[[YTA TV|Youtoo America]]: 2015–present<br>[[Z Living]]: 2019–present<br>[[YouTube]]: 2019–2024; 2025–present
|[[United Wrestling Network]]
|498 ({{as of|2025|07|18|lc=off}})
|
|-
|''[[TNA Reaction]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Paramount Network|Spike]]: 2010
|[[Total Nonstop Action Wrestling]]
|23
|
|-
|''Mana Mamau''
|{{NZL}}
|[[Whakaata Māori|Māori Television]]: 2011–2012
|[[Impact Pro Wrestling]]
|40
|
|-
|''World of Hurt''
|{{CAN}}
|[[Trace Urban|Trace]]: 2011–2012
|[[Lance Storm|Storm Wrestling Academy]]
|16
|<ref>{{cite web|url=http://slam.canoe.com/Slam/Wrestling/2011/05/05/18109696.html|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151208233455/http://slam.canoe.com/Slam/Wrestling/2011/05/05/18109696.html|url-status=dead|archive-date=8 December 2015|title=Lance Storm delivers a World of Hurt|last=Baines|first=Tim|date=5 May 2011|website=[[Canoe.com|Canadian Online Explorer]]|publisher=SLAM! Wrestling}}</ref>
|-
|''CMLL on Fox Sports''
|{{MEX}}
|[[Fox Sports]]: 2011–2015
|[[Consejo Mundial de Lucha Libre]]
|
| 
|-
|''UK Wrestling Mayhem''
|{{GBR}}
|[[MyTV (British and Irish TV channel)|My Channel]]: 2011–2012
|UK Wrestling
|46
|
|-
|''Turkish Power Wrestling''
|{{TUR}}
|UZMANTV: 2011–2012
|Turkish Power Wrestling
|
| 
|-
|''[[WWE Saturday Morning Slam]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[The CW]] ([[Vortexx]]): 2012–2013
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|38
|
|-
|''AAA Fusion''
|{{MEX}}
|[[TVC Deportes]]: 2012–2013
|[[Lucha Libre AAA Worldwide|Asistencia Asesoría y Administración]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[Ring Ka King]]''
|{{IND}}
|[[Viacom18|Colors]]: 2012
|[[Ring Ka King]] ([[Total Nonstop Action Wrestling]])
|26
|
|-
|''IWRG Zona XXI''
|{{MEX}}
|Canal 158 Cablevision: 2012–present
|[[International Wrestling Revolution Group]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[WWE Main Event]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Ion Television]]: 2012–2014<br>[[Hulu]]: 2012–2024<br>[[WWE Network]] and [[Peacock (streaming service)|Peacock]]: 2014–2025<br>[[YouTube]]: 2026–present
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]<br>([[Raw (WWE brand)|Raw]] and [[NXT (WWE brand)|NXT]])
|758 ({{as of|2026|1|15|lc=on}})
|
|-
|''Top of the World''
|{{CAN}}
|[[Réseau des sports|RDS2]]: 2013–2014
|Top of the World Wrestling
|
|<ref>{{cite web|url=http://slam.canoe.com/Slam/Wrestling/2013/11/26/21295861.html|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170723090127/http://slam.canoe.com/Slam/Wrestling/2013/11/26/21295861.html|url-status=dead|archive-date=23 July 2017|title=T.O.W. brings wrestling back to Quebec TV|last=Oliver|first=Greg|date=26 November 2013|website=[[Canoe.com|Canadian Online Explorer]]|publisher=SLAM! Wrestling}}</ref> 
|-
|''EPW Overload''
|{{ITA}}
|[[GXT]]: 2013–2014
|European Pro Wrestling
|
| 
|-
|''[[TNA British Boot Camp]]''
|{{GBR}}
|[[Challenge (TV channel)|Challenge]]: 2013–2014
|[[Total Nonstop Action Wrestling]]
|14
|
|-
|''Wrestle-1''
|{{JPN}}
|Gaora TV: 2013–2020
|[[Wrestle-1]]
|
| 
|-
|''Victory Wrestling Showcase''
|{{CAN}}
|[[Rogers TV]]: 2013–present
|Victory Commonwealth Wrestling
|
| 
|-
|''WWL Campeones del Ring''
|{{PRI}}
|[[WSTE-DT]]: 2013–2014
|[[La Liga Wrestling|World Wrestling League]]
|
| 
|-
|''WWE Beyond the Ring''
|{{USA}}
|[[WWE Network]]: 2014
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|28
|
|-
|''WWE Legends' House''
|{{USA}}
|[[WWE Network]]: 2014
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|10
|
|-
|''[[WWE Slam City]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[WWE Network]]: 2014<br>[[Nicktoons (American TV channel)|Nicktoons]]: 2014
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|26
|
|-
|''WLW Showdown''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 2019–present<br>[[YouTube]]: 2019–present
|[[Harley Race's Wrestling Academy|World League Wrestling]]<br>[[National Wrestling Alliance]]
|
|
|-
|''Reality of Wrestling TV''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 2014–present<br>[[YouTube]]: 2018–present
|[[Reality of Wrestling]]
|
| 
|-
|''West Coast Wrestling Connection''
|{{USA}}
|[[KPDX]]: 2014–present
|[[West Coast Wrestling Connection]]
|40 ({{as of|2015|3|1|lc=on}})
|
|-
|''[[Wrestling Retribution Project]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Justin.tv]]: 2014
|
|
|
|-
|''AAW Pro Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|MaddyGTV: 2014–2015
|[[AAW Wrestling|All American Wrestling]]
|32
|
|-
|''WAW Epic Encounters''
|{{GBR}}
|[[MyTV (British and Irish TV channel)|My Channel]]: 2014–2015
|[[World Association of Wrestling]]
|20
|
|-
|''[[Lucha Underground]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[El Rey Network]]: 2014–2018
|[[Lucha Underground]]
|127
|
|-
|''Paragon Pro Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|[[Pop (American TV channel)|Pop]]: 2015
|Paragon Pro Wrestling
|
| 
|-
|''ICW Fight Club''
|{{GBR}}
|[[MyTV (British and Irish TV channel)|My Channel]]: 2011–2012, [[Nuvola61|Nuvolari]]: 2016–2017
|[[Insane Championship Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''Lucha Azteca (Elite)''
|{{MEX}}
|[[Azteca 7]]: 2014–2018
|[[Lucha Libre Elite]]
|
|
|-
|''CMLL on Claro Sports''
|{{MEX}}
|Claro Sports: 2015–present
|[[Consejo Mundial de Lucha Libre]]
|
| 
|-
|''EWF on Sirk TV''
|{{USA}}
|SirkTV: 2016–present
|[[Empire Wrestling Federation]]
|
|
|-
|WCPW/Defiant Reloaded
|{{UK}}
|[[YouTube]]: 2016–2019
|[[WhatCulture]] Pro Wrestling<br>Defiant Wrestling
|60
|
|-
|''[[World of Sport Wrestling]]''<!--not old school wrestling on World Of Sport - see above for that-->
|{{GBR}}
|[[ITV (TV network)|ITV]]: 2016, 2018
|[[World of Sport Wrestling]]
|11 + unscreened pilot
|
|-
|''WAW Wrestling''
|{{GBR}}
|[[Mustard TV]]: 2016–present
|[[World Association of Wrestling]]
|
|
|-
|''[[WWE 205 Live]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[WWE Network]] and [[Peacock (streaming service)|Peacock]]: 2016–2022
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]<br>([[Raw (WWE brand)|Raw]], [[205 Live (WWE brand)|205 Live]] and [[NXT (WWE brand)|NXT]])
|270
|
|-
|''Rocky Mountain Pro Charged''
|{{USA}}
|[[Triller TV|FITE TV]]: 2017–2023<br>[[YouTube]]: 2017–present<br>[[Twitch (service)|Twitch]]: 2018–2024<br>[[Rumble (company)|Rumble]]: 2023–present<br>Right Now TV: 2023–present
|Rocky Mountain Pro Wrestling
|
|
|-
|''[[WWE Wal3ooha]]''
|{{ARE}}
|[[OSN Sports]]: 2017–present
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|7 ({{as of|2017|6|15|lc=on}})
|
|-
|''NWA Ten Pounds of Gold''
|{{USA}}
|[[YouTube]]: 2017
|[[National Wrestling Alliance]]
|
|
|-
|''CMLL on InterneTV''
|{{MEX}}
|InterneTV: 2017–present
|[[Consejo Mundial de Lucha Libre]]
|
| 
|-
|''[[MLW Fusion]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[beIN Sports (American TV channel)|beIN Sports USA]]: 2018–2023;2026–present<br>[[FuboTV#Fubo Sports Network|Fubo Sports Network]]:2020–2021<br>[[YouTube]]: 2020–2022; 2023;2026–present
|[[Major League Wrestling]]
|194 ({{as of|2023|12|14}})
|<ref>{{cite web|url=https://mlw.com/2020/10/30/mlw-returns-wednesday-nov-18-7pm/|title=YouTube to air Fusion Wednesday nights|publisher=MLW.com|date=2020-10-10|access-date=2020-11-18}}</ref>
|-
|''[[WWE Mixed Match Challenge]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Facebook Watch]] / [[WWE Network]]: 2018
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|25
|
|-
|''Ring Warriors''
|{{USA}}
|[[WGN America]]: 2018
|[[Ring Warriors]]
|13
|
|-
|''[[NXT UK]]''
|{{GBR}}
|[[TNT Sports (United Kingdom)|BT Sport]]: 2020–2022<br>[[5Action|Paramount Network]]: 2020–2022<br>[[5 (British TV channel)|Channel 5]]: 2020–2022 
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]<br>([[NXT UK (WWE brand)|NXT UK]])
|215
|
|-
|''Lucha Azteca (AAA)''
|{{MEX}}
|[[Azteca 7]]: 2019–present
|[[Lucha Libre AAA Worldwide|Asistencia Asesoría y Administración]]
|
| 
|-
|''CMLL on Marca''
|{{MEX}}
|[[Marca (newspaper)|Marca]]: 2019–present
|[[Consejo Mundial de Lucha Libre]]
|
| 
|-
|''CMLL on Ticketmaster Live''
|{{MEX}}
|[[Ticketmaster|Ticketmaster Live]]: 2019–present
|[[Consejo Mundial de Lucha Libre]]
|
|
|-
|''OVW Overdrive''
|{{USA}}
|[[YouTube]]: 2019–present
|[[Ohio Valley Wrestling]]
|106
|
|-
|''[[AEW Dynamite]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[TNT (American TV network)|TNT]]: 2019–2021<br>[[TruTV]]: 2019<br>[[TBS (American TV channel)|TBS]]: 2022–present<br>[[HBO Max]]: 2025–present
|[[All Elite Wrestling]]
|329 ({{as of|2026|1|21|lc=on}})
|
|-
|''[[Memphis Wrestling (2021)|Memphis Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[WLMT]]: 2019–2023<br>[[YouTube]]: 2021–present<br>[[Triller TV]]: 2025–present<br>[[WMC-TV]]: 2023–present
|[[United Wrestling Network]]<br>[[Memphis Wrestling (2021)|Memphis Wrestling]]
|256
| 
|-
|''[[NWA Powerrr]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[YouTube]]: 2019–2020; 2022–2023<br>[[Triller TV|FITE TV]]: 2021–2022<br>[[The CW|The CW App]]: 2024<br>[[X (social network)|X]]: 2024–2025<br>[[The Roku Channel|Roku Sports Channel]]: 2025–2026<br>[[Comet (TV network)|Comet]]: 2026-present
|[[National Wrestling Alliance]]
|138 ({{as of|2023|12|19|lc=on}})
|
|-
|''[[AEW Dark]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[YouTube]]: 2019–2023; 2025
|[[All Elite Wrestling]]
|194
|
|-
|''CCW Alive Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|[[YouTube]]: 2020–present
|[[Coastal Championship Wrestling]]
|226
|
|-
|''WWN Proving Ground''
|{{USA}}
|[[YouTube]]: 2020–present
|American Combat Wrestling (2020–2021)<br>[[WWNLive|World Wrestling Network]] (2020–present)
|129 (as of March 2025)
|
|-
|''[[UWN Primetime Live]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Triller TV|FITE TV]]: 2020
|[[United Wrestling Network]]<br>[[National Wrestling Alliance]]
|12
|
|-
|''[[NJPW Strong]]''
|{{JPN}}<br>{{USA}}
|[[New Japan Pro-Wrestling World|NJPW World]]: 2020–2023
|[[New Japan Pro-Wrestling]]
|126
|<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.pwtorch.com/site/2020/08/05/njpw-strong-details-announced-for-njpw-world-new-weekly-show-will-debut-with-njpw-cup-usa-tournament/|title=NJPW Strong details announced for NJPW World, new weekly show will debut with NJPW Cup USA tournament|work=Pro Wrestling Torch|publisher=TDH Communications LLC|first=Sean|last=Radican|date=5 August 2020|access-date=11 August 2020}}</ref>
|-
|''[[NWA Shockwave (TV program)|NWA Shockwave]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[YouTube]]: 2020–2021
|[[National Wrestling Alliance]]
|4
|
|-
|''[[AEW Dark: Elevation]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[YouTube]]: 2021–2023
|[[All Elite Wrestling]]
|112
|
|-
|''[[DPW Fire]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[YouTube]]<br>DPW On Demand: 2021–2022
|[[Deadlock Pro-Wrestling]]
|11
|
|-
|''[[Before the Impact]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[AXS TV]]: 2021–2022<br>[[TNA+|Impact Plus]]: 2022–2023
|[[Total Nonstop Action Wrestling|Impact Wrestling]]
|141
|
|-
|''Championship Wrestling from Atlanta''
|{{USA}}
|[[YouTube]]: 2021
|[[United Wrestling Network]]
|11 (as of January 21, 2026)
|
|-
|''[[AEW Rampage]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[TNT (American TV network)|TNT]]: 2021–2024<br>[[TBS (American TV channel)|TBS]] (overflow coverage): 2024
|[[All Elite Wrestling]]
|177
|
|-
|''MLW Fusion: Alpha''
|{{USA}}
|[[Triller TV|FITE TV]]: 2021<br>[[BeIN Sports]]: 2021<br>[[YouTube]]: 2021
|[[Major League Wrestling]]
|13
| 
|-
|''[[AEW Battle of the Belts]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[TNT (American TV network)|TNT]]: 2022–2024
|[[All Elite Wrestling]]
|12
|
|-
|''JCP Wide World of Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|[[YouTube]]: 2022–2023
|Joe Cazana Promotions<br>[[National Wrestling Alliance]]
|32
|
|-
|''[[NWA USA]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[YouTube]]: 2022–2023
|Joe Cazana Promotions
|
|
|-
|''[[WWE NXT Level Up]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Peacock (streaming service)|Peacock]]: 2022–2024
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]<br>([[NXT (WWE brand)|NXT]])
|150
|
|-
|''DPCW Paradox''
|{{USA}}
|[[YouTube]]: 2023–present
|Dogg Pound Championship Wrestling<br>[[National Wrestling Alliance]]
|17
| 
|-
|Monday Magic
|{{JPN}}
|[[Wrestle Universe]]: 2023-present
|[[Pro Wrestling NOAH]]
|25
| 
|-
|''[[MLW Underground Wrestling]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Reelz]]: 2023
|[[Major League Wrestling]]
|13
| 
|-
|''Derby City Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|[[WBKI (TV)|WBKI]]: 2023–2024<br>[[YouTube]]: 2023–2024
|[[United Wrestling Network]]
|24
|
|-
|''[[AEW Collision]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[TNT (American TV network)|TNT]]: 2023–present<br>[[TBS (American TV channel)|TBS]] (overflow coverage): 2024–present<br>[[HBO Max]]: 2025–present
|[[All Elite Wrestling]]
|85 ({{as of|2025|3|15|lc=on}})
|
|-
|''NWA JCP Southeast''
|{{USA}}
|[[YouTube]]: 2024–present
|Joe Cazana Promotions<br>[[National Wrestling Alliance]]
|32
|
|-
|''OVW Rise''
|{{USA}}
|Syndicated: 2024–present<br>[[WBNA]]: 2024–present<br>[[YouTube]]: 2024–present
|[[Ohio Valley Wrestling]]
|41
|
|-
|''[[WWE Speed]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[X (social network)|X]]: 2024–2025
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|76
|
|-
|''[[JCW Lunacy]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[YouTube]]: 2024–present
|[[Juggalo Championship Wrestling]]
|82 (as of May 20, 2026)
|
|-
|''[[WWE LFG|WWE Legends & Future Greats]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[A&E (TV network)|A&E]]: 2025–present
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]<br>([[Evolve (WWE brand)|Evolve]], [[NXT (WWE brand)|NXT]] and [[WWE Recruit|WWE ID]])
|
|
|-
|''[[WWE Evolve]]''
|{{USA}}
|[[Tubi]]: 2025–present
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]<br>([[Evolve (WWE brand)|Evolve]])
|52 ({{as of|2026|03|18|lc=on}})
|
|-
|''WXM Ground Zero''
|{{IND}}
|[[YouTube]]: 2025–present
|Wrestling Xtreme Mania
|4 (as of January 21, 2026)
|
|-
|''[[Lucha Libre AAA Worldwide|Lucha Libre AAA]]''
|{{MEX}}
|[[Fox (Mexico)|Fox]]; 2026–present<br>[[Tubi]]: 2026–present<br>[[Fox One]]: 2026–present
|[[Lucha Libre AAA Worldwide]]<br>[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|8 (as of March 7, 2026)
|
|-
|''Gotham Wrestling''
|{{USA}}
|Syndication: 2026–present<br>[[YouTube]]: 2026–present
|[[United Wrestling Network]]
|2 (as of January 21, 2026)
|
|-
|''[[MLP Mayhem (TV program)|MLP Mayhem]]''
|{{CAN}}
|[[The Sports Network|TSN]]: July 2026
|[[Maple Leaf Pro Wrestling]]
|
|<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.f4wonline.com/news/indies/maple-leaf-pro-wrestling-announces-tv-deal/|title=Maple Leaf Pro Wrestling announces TV deal|work=[[Wrestling Observer Newsletter|Wrestling Observer Newsletter/Figure 4 Weekly]]|last=Verhei|first=Vincent|date=2026-03-27|access-date=2026-03-28}}</ref>
|-
|}

==International Broadcasters==
{|class="wikitable sortable"
|-
!Series
!Country
!Duration
!Promotion
!No. of episodes
|-
|''[[New Japan Pro-Wrestling]]''
|{{flagicon|JPN}} [[Japan]]<br> {{flagicon|USA}} [[United States]]
|[[AXS TV]]: 2014–2019, 2020–2025<br>[[The Roku Channel]]: 2020–2025
|[[New Japan Pro-Wrestling]] 
|
|-
|[[Consejo Mundial de Lucha Libre]]
|{{flagicon|MEX}} [[Mexico]]<br> {{flagicon|USA}} [[United States]]
|[[LATV]]: 2007–present
|[[Consejo Mundial de Lucha Libre]]
|
|-
|''[[NXT UK]]''
|{{GBR}}<br>{{USA}}
|[[WWE Network]]: 2018–2021<br>[[Peacock (streaming service)|Peacock]]: 2021–2022
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]<br>([[NXT UK (WWE brand)|NXT UK]])
|215
|-
|''[[TNA Impact!]]''
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[United States]]<br>{{flagicon|CAN}} [[Canada]]
|[[Fight Network]]: 2015–present<br>[[GameTV]]: 2016–present<br>[[Sportsnet 360]]: 2025–present
|[[Total Nonstop Action Wrestling]]
|
|-
|''[[Saturday Night's Main Event|WWE Saturday Night's Main Event]]''
|{{USA}}<br>International
|[[YouTube]]: 2024–present
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|
|-
|''[[WWE Evolve]]''
|{{USA}}<br>International
|[[YouTube]]: 2025–present
|[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|
|-
|''[[TNA Xplosion]]''
|{{USA}}<br>{{GBR}}
|[[Challenge (TV channel)|Challenge]]: 2011–2017<br>[[5Star]]: 2017–2018
|[[Total Nonstop Action Wrestling]]
|
|-
|[[Lucha Libre AAA Worldwide|Lucha Libre AAA]]
|{{flagicon|MEX}} [[Mexico]]<br> International
|[[YouTube]]: 2026–present
|[[Lucha Libre AAA Worldwide]]<br>[[WWE|World Wrestling Entertainment]]
|
|-
|}

==See also==
*[[Monday Night War]]
*[[Wednesday Night Wars]]
*[[List of professional wrestling streaming services]]
*[[List of WWE broadcasters]]
*[[List of WWE television programming]]
*[[List of Total Nonstop Action Wrestling programming]]

==References==
;General
*{{cite book|title=Professional Wrestling: Sport and Spectacle|last1=Mazer|first1=Sharon|publisher=University Press of Mississippi|year=1998|isbn=978-1-57806-021-4}}
*{{cite book|last=Greenberg|first=Keith Elliot|title=Pro Wrestling: From Carnivals to Cable TV|publisher=Lerner Publications|year=2000|isbn=0-8225-3332-4|url-access=registration|url=https://archive.org/details/prowrestlingfrom00gree}}
*{{cite book|author= Hornbaker, Tim|title= National Wrestling Alliance: The Untold Story of the Monopoly that Strangled Pro Wrestling|publisher=ECW Press|year=2007|isbn=978-1-55022-741-3}}
*{{cite book|title=Wrestling's Greatest Moments|last1=Rickard|first1=Mike|publisher=ECW Press|year=2008|isbn=978-1-55490-331-3}}
*{{cite book|title=WWE Encyclopedia|last1=Shields|first1=Brian|last2=Sullivan|first2=Kevin|publisher=[[Dorling Kindersley|DK]]|year=2009|isbn=978-0-7566-4190-0|url-access=registration|url=https://archive.org/details/wweencyclopediad0000shie}}
*{{cite book|title=Encyclopedia of Television|last1=Newcomb|first1=Horace|publisher=Routledge|year=2014|isbn=9781135194727}}

;Specific
{{reflist}}

==External links==
*{{cite web|url=https://www.solie.org/articles/pwandfans.html|title=Professional Wrestling and its Fans: A Sociological Study of the Sport of Pro-Wrestling|last1=Kreit|first1=Alex|year=1998|website=Solie.org|series=Sports and Society|publisher=[[Amherst College]]|access-date=15 May 2015}}
*{{cite web|url=https://sites.google.com/site/chrisharrington/wwftv|title=History of WWE Television Programs (1982–2014)|last1=Harrington|first1=Chris|year=2014|website=Indeed Wrestling|publisher=[[Google Sites]]|access-date=15 May 2015}}
{{Lists of television programs by genre}}
{{Professional wrestling in the United States}}
[[Category:Lists of television series by genre|Professional wrestling]]
[[Category:Professional wrestling television series| ]]
[[Category:Professional wrestling-related lists|Television series]]
